meaning: he descended/fell (in إِذَا هَوَىٰ - when it falls)
he went astray (negated by ما before it)
he strayed (past tense, connected to ما meaning 'not')
not (used with إِلَّا to mean 'not except/but')
it (referring to what was mentioned before)
except (what comes after it from هُوَ/it)
a revelation (subject of يُوحَىٰ - is revealed)
it is being revealed (object of إِلَّا)
in/at the horizon (of الْأَعْلَىٰ - the highest)
then (followed by دَنَا - he came near)
then he was (connected to previous ayah)
His servant (possessed by Allah, following إلى)
the heart (subject of مَا كَذَبَ - did not lie)
do you then dispute with him? (about مَا يَرَىٰ - what he saw)
a single descent (describing رَءَاهُ - he saw him)
at/near (سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ - the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary)
of the lote tree (possessed by المنتهى)
the ultimate end (location mentioned in سِدْرَةِ)
near it/her (referring to جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ - Garden of Refuge)
he covers/overwhelms (present tense, of ٱلسِّدْرَةَ - the lote tree)
the sight (subject of زَاغَ - did not deviate)
he transgressed (describing what happened in مَا زَاغَ)
he saw (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ seeing signs of Allah)
The Lat (as the object being discussed)
and fate (the name of an idol)
that (feminine, far away) (pointing to قِسْمَةٌ - division)
in that case/therefore (connects to قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ - an unfair division)
if (introducing the condition that they follow only assumptions)
it (referring to the false idols/names mentioned after)
they follow closely/earnestly (referring to the disbelievers following false desires)
the assumption (object of يَتَّبِعُونَ - they follow)
and what/that which (connects to يَتَّبِعُونَ - they follow)
for/to the human being (object of أَمْ)
and how many (introduces a rhetorical question about مَّلَكٍ/angels)
anything/something (object of تُغْنِى - does not avail)
except (excluding what follows from لَا تُغْنِى - does not benefit)
that (connects to يَأْذَنَ - He gives permission)
he permits/allows (subject of يَشَآءُ - he wills)
those who (plural, referring to the disbelievers mentioned in لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ)
the angels (object of يُسَمُّونَ - they name)
the assumption (object of يَتَّبِعُونَ - they follow)
and indeed (connects to previous statement about false assumptions)
the assumption (that they follow instead of knowledge)
he makes sufficient (negated by لَا in this ayah)
anything (that is being affected by يُغْنِى - does not benefit at all)
away from (used with تَوَلَّىٰ - turns away)
away from (connects تَوَلَّىٰ to what follows)
our remembrance (object of عَن/turning away from)
he wants/seeks (after لَمْ in this ayah)
except/only (excluding ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا from what came before)
the life (object of يُرِدْ - he wants)
your Lord (the one being referred to by إِنَّ)
with/by whoever (connected to أَعْلَمُ - most knowing)
about who/whoever (object of أَعْلَمُ, connected to ضَلَّ)
in/within (connects السَّمٰوٰتِ to what comes before)
the heavens (possessed by/connected to what follows)
so that he may give what is due (connected to أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟)
those who (subject of يَجْزِىَ - will reward)
with what/by what (connects to عَمِلُوا۟ - they did)
they did/performed (referring to those who did evil in أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟)
and he gives what is due (connected to لِيَجْزِىَ)
they keep themselves away/avoid (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)
major sins (object of يَجْتَنِبُونَ - they avoid)
of the sin (object of يَجْتَنِبُونَ - they avoid)
and the many very bad/shameful things (object of يَجْتَنِبُونَ - they avoid)
except (what comes after in the ayah)
one who is spacious/encompassing (subject of المَغْفِرَةِ)
he created you all (object of أَعْلَمُ - he knows best)
the earth (being described in this ayah)
more knowing, most knowing (describes هُوَ/He - Allah)
have you then seen? (connected to ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ - the one who turned away)
the one who/which (refers back to the one who turned away)
is there with him? (connected to يَرَىٰٓ)
with/by what (that is in صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ)
in (location within صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ - scrolls of Moses)
that not (introduces the statement تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ)
a female bearer (of وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ - another's burden)
and that (connects this thought to the previous one)
except (what comes after it in this ayah: مَا سَعَىٰ - what he strived for)
and indeed/and that (connects to سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ - will be seen)
is seen (something that سَعْيَهُۥ/his striving will be)
then (shows this event comes after يُجْزَىٰهُ - he will be recompensed)
he is repaid with it (object of الْجَزَآءَ)
and that/and indeed (emphasizes what follows: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ)
the ultimate end (referring to the final destination with Allah)
and indeed He (referring to Allah in هُوَ أَضْحَكَ)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and that He (referring to Allah in هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا)
he caused to die (connected to هُوَ in وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ)
and he caused to live/gave life (subject of أَمَاتَ)
and that He (refers to Allah in this context)
the two pairs (object of خَلَقَ - created)
from a single drop of fluid (emphasized) (after مِن)
when (specifically for future events, used with تُمْنَىٰ)
it is emitted (describing نُّطْفَةٍ - a drop)
and indeed/and that (connects to previous statement)
upon him (connected to النَّشْأَةَ - the raising/resurrection)
the creation (object of عَلَيْهِ - upon him is)
the other (referring to the next life/resurrection mentioned in ٱلنَّشْأَةَ)
and that He (is the one who أَغْنَىٰ)
and He made (someone) wealthy (paired with أَغْنَىٰ)
and indeed he/it (subject of هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ)
the first (feminine) (referring to عَادًا, the ancient tribe of 'Aad)
And Thamud (as object of فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ - what He left)
they were (referring to قَوْمَ نُوحٍ - the people of Noah)
they (referring to the people of Noah in قَوْمَ نُوحٍ)
and more transgressing (compared to أَظْلَمَ/more wrongdoing)
and the overturned one (the city that was destroyed)
He made (it) fall (referring to Allah destroying cities)
and then he covered it completely (referring to what is described in مَا غَشَّىٰ)
a warner (one of many warners mentioned in هٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ)
The Approaching One (referring to the Day of Judgment)
from/of (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)
besides/other than (connected to مِن before it)
any female/thing that removes covers (subject of ليس)
Then is it from (هٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ - this discourse)
those (men) who are distracted/playful (while وَأَنتُمْ/and you all)
to/for Allah (object of فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ and وَٱعْبُدُوا۟)
